raw_consumer_statement:
I was Notified by Home Depot on XXXX 2024 of fraud {$1100.00} by text message and email. I Contacted by the number provided and reported fraud. Issued new card. Card was not lost or stolen. I have not used it since early 2024. Charges are now {$1400.00} plus {$29.00} late fee. Contacted Home Depot fraud department with no resolution. Have now written to Home Depot as well. Statement says charges were to Home Depot warehouse. I contacted the state attorney generals office and was referred to this agency. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I went to the Home Depot in XXXX RI and used my XXXX card for a {$9.00} purchase of leaf bags. I put my phone number in for my Home Depot Veterans discount which seems to have triggered the fraud.. I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX.
